notable_excerpts: We have also invested a lot in the past two quarters in building solid programs and heavily into recruitment, especially in our mature units.
Our integrated health care ecosystem spanning hospitals, diagnostics, pharmacies and digital platforms will continue to deliver balanced growth and improved asset utilization.

We are using artificial intelligence technologies very broadly... that business, which is from the website grew from last year to the year by 318%, mostly due to the adoption of a very scalable AI technology.
reinforces our ability to sustain growth momentum while maintaining financial discipline and operating efficiency.
With a disciplined approach to execution and a clear road map for growth, we are confident of enhancing our performance in the coming quarters.
The statutory processes for the restructuring within Apollo HealthCo and the Keimed merger continue to proceed as per plan.

The overall ESG score is calculated based on the weighted contributions of each pillar.
